title: Disney Zombies
description: adds stuff from all four zombies movies (and some of 5)
body:
Have you ever wanted the disney zombies characters in minecraft? well now you can. this mod adds most of the characters, eight new biomes, 10 new structures, and much more. 

if you can think of something to add to the mod (from the movies) leave a comment on my discord. i might add it to the next update.

zombies five in progress.
